title: Cynoglossospermum consanguineum

taxonomy: Cynoglossospermum consanguineum belongs to the family Fabaceae. This plant is a member of the genus Cynoglossospermum. Within the family Fabaceae, Cynoglossospermum consanguineum is classified under the subfamily Faboideae. The species is further categorized into the tribe Millettieae. It is a legume, which is a common characteristic of the family Fabaceae.
